title: Add minimal SSE live metric slice with polling fallback intact
objective: Implement the smallest additive realtime slice: one SSE route pushing held-side current price and directly derived live equity/unrealized PnL while keeping current polling fallback untouched.
acceptance_criteria: dashboard no longer depends only on polling for at least one live metric path
one pushed metric path is visibly working
rollback: Remove /api/stream/state route and EventSource hookup; polling remains intact.
